description: THE DAILY WORKER FIGHTS For a WorkersFarmers Government To Organize the Unorganized Against Imperialist War For the 40Hour Week Vol VI No 114 ATTACK OF CHINESE WAR LORDS ON OSSR CUSTOMS HOUSE AND NANKING LIES FORCED DIPLOMATIC BREAK CHINESE WORKERS IN AMERICA CALL FOR DEFENSE OF SOVIET UNION AGAINST IMPERIALISTS Score Tools of American and World Imperialists Who Lead Chinese Armies Against USSR Declare That Many Soldiers Will Desert Brand Seizure of Railroad as Brigandage The Chinese workers in America through their organ izations in the food workers and other industries especially in New York City yesterday expressed their utter contempt j and hatred for the war lords of China who have reared a throne on the corpses of thousands of beheaded Chinese workers and who now seek to use the working class of China as cannon fodder in an attack on the Soviet Union The soldiers should desert the militarists say the Chinese workers here and call on all workers verywhere to support the Socialist Fatherland of all labor he state ment is as follows DENOUNCE CHIANG KAISHEK TERROR Speaking in the name of the Alliance for Support of the Chinese Workers and Peasants Revolution we Chinese workers and
